calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application For Default
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos. Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Rachel Loh, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, VIRBALA PATEL.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AMRATLAL PATEL, HARIGANGABEN A PATEL, JAYESH PATEL
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness: VIRBALA PATEL Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $2550.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $450.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $3000.00
Judgment signed in open court.
